From:

Sent:
14 January 2026 17:29
Subject:
A/c SARAOGI GLOBAL or nom 75k/10% OO COAL ex RBCT to ECI L/C 19-19 Feb or 19 - 28 Feb CHOPT - Please offer prior 1600h IST time 15.01.2026.
Date   : 14.01.2026
To.      : Panamax / Kamsarmax Desk
From : Anand S Mehta - Reshamwala Shipbrokers
KIND ATTN. CHARTERING DESK
OWNERS KINDLY SEND US YOUR FIRM FREIGHT & DEMURRAGE OFFERS AGAINST RESPECTIVE LAY CAN & DISCHARGE RATE
LATEST BY 16:00 HRS IST,15TH JAN 2024
AGANINST CHARTERERS BELOW TERMS FOR REVIEW AND REPLY. OWNS FREIGHT & DEMURRAGE OFFER SHOULD REMAIN VALID FOR AT LEAST ONE WORKING DAY AFTER THE SUBMISSION OF CLOSING TIME.
OWNERS PLEASE QUOTE FREIGHT & DEMURRAGE OFFEERS STRICTLY AS PER BELOW MENTIONED TERMS ONLY OR ELSE CHARTERER MAY NOT BE ABLE TO CONSIDER THE OFFER FOR COUNTER.
-PERFORMING OWNERS :
PLEASE ADVISE PERFORMING OWNERS FULL STYLE INCLUDING PIC NAME & CONTACT NUMBERS.
COMPLETE BANK DETAILS INCLUDING INTERMEDIARY BANK AC. NUMBER & SWIFT CODE
-OWNERS PLS ADVISE COMPLETE C/P CHAIN DETAILS:
-PERFORMING VESSEL WITH TC DESCRIPTION:
WOG TO BE DELETED FROM THE VESSEL DESCRIPTION.
-LAST FIVE CARGOS
-VESSEL FIRM ITINERARY & ETA LOAD PORT:
-ALL NEGOTIATION AND EVENTUAL FIXTURE IF ANY TO BE KEPT STRICTLY P+C AND NOT REPORTED   BY ANY PARTIES.
-CHARTERERS:- ACCT. SARAOGI GLOBAL PTE LTD, SINGAPORE"  OR SARAOGI UDYOG PRIVATE LIMITED, KOLKATA OR " OR NOMINEE .
-CHARTERER SHALL HAVE PRIVILEDGE OF TRANSFERRING PART OR WHOLE OF THE CHARTER PARTY TO "SARAOGI GLOBAL PTE LTD. SINGAPORE,/ SARAOGI UDYOG PVT LTD. KOLKATA AS APPLICABLE "., EACH PARTY REMAINING ACCOUNTABLE FOR PAYMENT OF FRT AND FINAL SETTLEMENT OF THE FILE.
A
– THE VESSEL OWNER WARRANTS THAT PERFORMING VESSEL SHALL BE SINGLE DECKER, SELF TRIMMING SEAWORTHY BULK CARRIER, CLASS MAINTAINED EQUIVALENT TO LLYODS 100 A1, NOT MORE THAN
20 YEARS OLD
,
THE MAX VESSEL SIZE ACCEPTABLE
LOA  230 METERS AND BEAM 32.26 METERS
TO BE SUITABLE FOR LOADING AND DISCHARGING AS PER RESTRICTIONS & REQUIREMENTS OF THE RESPECTIVE LOAD & DISCHARGE PORTS INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DRAUGHT, AIR DRAUGHT ETC
.
IT IS OWNERS, RESPONSIBILITY TO GET THE VESSEL ACCEPTED BENDS. VESSEL NOMINATED BY THE OWNER IS TO BE RIGHTSHIP APPROVED AND MUST COMPLY WITH ALL APPLICABLE SOUTH AFRICAN & INDIAN LAWS AND ANY REGULATIONS OR REQUIREMENTS OF THE LOADING AND DISCHARGING PORTS, BEING IN THOROUGHLY SEAWORTHY CONDITION & IS CAPABLE OF ACHIEVING THE GUARANTEED LOADING AND DISCHARGING RATE;
OWNS TO PROVIDE SEAWORTHINESS CERTIFICATE OF THE PERFERMING VESSEL .
THE VESSEL ACCEPTANCE IS SUBJECT TO RBCT, SHIPPER, RECEIVER’S & CHARTERER’S ACCEPTANCE.
THE VESSEL SHOULD NOT HAVE HANDLED SANCATIONED CARGO & THE OWNS, MANAGERS AND DISPONENT OWNS DOWN THE CP CHAIN SHOULD NOT HAVE SANCTIONED BY U.S.A., E.U. OR UNO.
“SANCTIONS” MEANS ECONOMIC OR FINANCIAL SANCTIONS OR TRADE EMBARGOES OR TRADE RESTRICTIONS OR SIMILAR OR EQUIVALENT RESTRICTIVE MEASURES IMPOSED, ADMINISTERED, ENACTED OR ENFORECED FROM TIME TO TIME BY THE UN, EU OR US OR OTHER APPLICABLE SANCTIONS AUTHORITY
OWNERS TO NOMINATE PERFORMING VESSEL AS PER RBCT GUIDELINES OR WITHIN  1 DAY OF FIXING OF MAIN TERMS ALONGWITH ALL VALID CERTIFICATES & VALID SURVEY ENDORSEMENTS AS PER LIST. THE CHARTERER SHALL REPLY ON THE ACCEPTANCE OF THE VSL WITHIN 1 RBCT WORKING DAY OR WITHIN 24 HRS. HOWEVER ALWAYS AFTER SUCH VESSEL ACCEPTED BY RBCT WHICH EVER IS LATTER FROM RECEIPT OF SUCH VSL NOMINATION.
IN CASE OWNERES WISHES TO SUBSTITUE THE VESSEL, OWNERS TO NOMINATE A SUITABLE VESSEL STRICTLY AS PER RBCT RULES AND REGULATIONS, HOWEVER THE SAID NOMINATION SHOULD REACH TO CHARTERERS 2HRS. BEFORE CLOSEING OF RBCT OFFICE HRS. CHARTERS TO REPLY WITHIN 26 HRS. (RBCT OFFICE HRS.).
B
- VESSEL IS TO PROVIDE LOADING AND DISCHARGING PORT USERS WITH FREE USE OF WINCHES AND RELATED ELECTRICITY POWER REQUIRED FOR LOADING, TRIMMING, STOWAGE & DISCHARGING OF THE COAL ON BOARD AS & WHEN REQURED BY RESPECTIVE USERS / STEVEDORES.
C
- VESSEL SHOULD HAVE LIGHTING FACILITIES AND CREW SHOULD BE AVAILABLE ALL TIME I.E. LOADING , DISCHARING WHARPING, MOORING & ETC.,
D-
VESSEL IS TO BE CLASSED LLOYDS 100A1 OR EQUIVALENT, WHERE THE CLASSIFICATION SOCIETY SHALL BE A MEMBER OF THE INTERNATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF CLASSIFICATION SOCIETIES AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS CHARTER .
E
- VESSEL IS TO COMPLY IN EVERY RESPECT WITH ALL INTERNATIONAL & LOCAL PORT REGULATIONS & REQUIREMENTS AND OR PRACTICES AND ALL REGULATIONS GOVERNING THE CARRIAGE BY SEA OF COAL IN BULK;
F
- VESSEL IS NOT TO BE OWNED, MANNED, BENEFICIALLY OWNED OR CONTROLLED, MANAGED OR OPERATED BY NATIONAL OR COMPANY WHICH IS OR ARE SUBJECT TO
ANY U.S.A. SANCTIONS ADMINISTERED BY THE OFFICE OF FOREIGN ASSETS CONTROL OF THE U.S.A. DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY,OR SUBJECT TO SANCTIONS BY THE UNITED STATES, EUROPEAN UNION OR UNITED NATIONS;
G
- VESSEL SHOULD NOT HAVE CORRUGATION IN HOLDS WHICH ARE ARRANGED HORIZONTALLY;
H
- OWNERS GUARANTEE THAT VSL, OWNERS AND HEADOWNERS ARE ENTERED WITH AND INSURED BY AN INTERNATIONAL GROUP PNI CLUB AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS CHARTER;
I
- OWNERS GUARANTEE THAT VSL IS FULLY H+M INSURED AND WILL REMAIN SO FOR THE DURATION OF THIS CHARTER.
J
- OWNERS GUARANTEE THAT ALL VSL’S CERTIFICATES ARE VALID AND FULLY UPTODATE AND SHALL REMAIN VALID FOR THE DURATION OF THIS CHARTER
.
OWNERS ACCEPT THAT SUCH CERTIFICATES ARE TO BE AVAILABLE TO CHARTERERS / THEIR REPRESENTAIVES OR STATURARY AUTHORITIES IF REQUESTED / DEMANDED
VESSEL IS TO HAVE ALL REQUISITE CERTIFICATES REQUIRED AS PER THE TRADE, LOAD & DISCHARGE PORT COUNTRIES, RUELES AND REGULATION, IMO RULES AND REGULATIONS, INTL RULES & REGULATIONS INCLUDING ISM, BALLAST MANAGEMENT ETC.
K
- OWNERS GUARANTEE THAT VESSEL\'S HOLDS ARE FREE OF ANY OBSTRUCTIONS/BULKHEADS / STANCHIONS, AND THAT VSL IS IN ALL RESPECT SUITABLE TO SHIP/LOAD/DISCH THE INTENDED CARGO.
L-
THE OWNERS TO ENSURE THAT VESSEL HAS NO OUTSTANDING RECOMMENDATIONS, RESTRICTIONS OR ANY OTHER REQUIREMENTS OF ANY NATURE IN RESPECT OF FLAG STATE, PORT STATE CONTROL OR CLASSIFICATION INSPECTIONS.
M
- THE PERFORMING OWNER CONFIRM THAT THE VESSEL WILL NOT CHANGE OWNERSHIP / FLAG DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS CHARTER.
N
- THE OWNER IS  RESPONSIBLE FOR PROVIDING THE VESSEL FOR THE TRANSPORATATION AND LOADING OF COAL TO BE DELIVERED UNDER THIS AGREEMENT . OWNERS AND/ OR DISPONENT OWNERS GUARANTEE THAT, THE VESSEL WILL BE DELIVERED FREE FROM ANY OBLIGATION, ENCUMBRANCE, CLAIM OR LIEN OF WHATSOEVER NATURE THAT WOULD INTERFERE IN ANY WAY WITH THE VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE OF THIS VOYAGE AND / OR THE CARRIAGE AND DELIVERY OF THE CARGO WITH THE UTMOST DISPATCH, AND SHALL REMAIN THROUGHOUT THE CURRENCY OF THE CHARTER. IN THE EVENT THE VESSEL / CARGO IS UNDER LIEN OR ARRESTED OR OTHERWISE DETAINED DURING THE CURRENCY OF THIS CHARTERER PARTY ( OR AFTER COMPLETION OF DISCHARGE IN RESPECT OF THE CARGO ) THE OWNER’S / DISPONENT OWNER’S SHALL TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION TO PROCURE THE RELEASE OF THE VESSEL / CARGO FROM ANY SUCH LIEN OR ARREST OR DETENTION AND TO REMAIN FULLY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE COST OR DAMAGES CAUSED AS A RESULT OF ANY LIEN OR ARREST OR INTERRUPTION OF THE VESSEL’S PERFORMANCE UNDER THIS CHARTER PARTY.
O-
(FOR AVOIDANCE OF DOUBT, OWNERS CONFIRM THAT THE LOADING TERMS TO BE GOVERNED STRICTLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE LATEST SHIPPING REGULATIONS ISSUED BY RBCT RULES AND ALL SUCH RULES, REGULATIONS REQUIREMENTS AND RESTRICTIONS ARE HEREBY FULLY INCORPORATED INTO THIS CHARTER PARTY BY THIS REFERENCE.
ANY DAMAGES, DELAYS, CLAIMS, COSTS AND EXPENSES WHATSOEVER ARISING FROM THE VESSEL/ MASTER/ OWNER’S NON-COMPLIANCE WITH RBCT RULES SHALL BE TO THE OWNER’S ACCOUNT. IN THE EVENT OF ANY INCONSISTENCY BETWEEN THE TERMS OF THIS CONTRACT AND THE STANDARD SHIPPING REGULATIONS OF THE PORT OF LOADING, THE STANDARD SHIPPING REGULATIONS OF THE PORT OF LOADING SHALL PREVAIL OVER THE TERMS OF THIS CONTACT.)
Q-
AIR POLLUTION BUNKER CLAUSE-
OWNERS SHALL HAVE STRICT LIABILITY UNDER THIS CLAUSE AND THEIR OBLIGATIONS WILL NOT BE AFFECTED NOR REDUCED BY ANY OTHER PROVISIONS OF THE CHARTER PARTY.
FOR THE PURPOSE OF THIS CLAUSE:
“MARPOL ANNEX VI” SHALL MEAN MARPOL ANNEX VI AS AMENDED OR REVISED FROM TIME TO TIME; AND“EMISSION CONTROL ZONE” SHALL MEAN ZONES AND/OR AREAS AS STIPULATED IN MARPOL ANNEX VI AND/OR ZONES AND/OR AREAS (APPLYING AT SEA OR IN PORT) REGULATED BY ANY LOCAL, REGIONAL AND/OR NATIONAL AUTHORITIES SUCH AS, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE EU AND THE US ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY, THE CHINESE MINISTRY OF TRANSPORT AND AMSA.
NOTWITHSTANDING ANY OTHER PROVISION OF THIS CHARTER PARTY:
OWNERS WARRANT THAT THE VESSEL SHALL, AT THEIR RISK, TIME AND EXPENSE, COMPLY FOR THE DURATION OF THE CHARTER PARTY WITH ALL APPLICABLE RULES, REGULATIONS AND LAWS RELEVANT TO AIR POLLUTION INCLUDING WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE GENERALITY OF THE FOREGOING MARPOL ANNEX VI AND WITH ALL REQUIREMENTS OF ANY EMISSION CONTROL ZONE.
OWNERS WILL ENSURE THE VESSEL HAS A VALID INTERNATIONAL AIR POLLUTION PREVENTION CERTIFICATE ALONG WITH ANY OTHER CERTIFICATION REQUIRED IN AN EMISSION CONTROL ZONE AND THAT THE VESSEL KEEPS RECORDS AS REQUIRED BY MARPOL ANNEX VI.
IF THE VESSEL IS INSTALLED WITH AN EXHAUST GAS CLEANING SYSTEM (“EGCS”), OWNERS SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR ENSURING THAT THE EGCS IS FOR THE DURATION OF THE CHARTER PARTY (I) CLASS APPROVED (WHERE RELEVANT) AND MEETING ALL REGULATORY AND CERTIFICATION REQUIREMENTS, (II) FULLY OPERATIONAL, (III) OPERATING AT MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY AND (IV) THAT THE VESSEL IS FITTED AND OPERATED IN ACCORDANCE WITH MARPOL ANNEX VI AND THE REQUIREMENTS OF ANY EMISSION CONTROL ZONES.
OWNERS SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR REMOVING ALL FUELS FROM THE VESSEL THAT DO NOT COMPLY WITH ANY REVISIONS OR AMENDMENTS TO MARPOL ANNEX VI (UNLESS THEY ARE PERMITTED DUE TO A EGCS BEING FITTED ON THE VESSEL), WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME PRIOR TO THE DATE OF ANY SUCH REVISIONS OR AMENDMENTS COMING INTO FORCE, AND OWNERS SHALL BEAR ALL AND ANY RISK, TIME, LOSS, DELAY, FINES, COSTS AND EXPENSES IN RELATION TO THE REMOVAL OF ANY SUCH FUELS.
OWNERS SHALL COMPENSATE, INDEMNIFY, DEFEND AND HOLD HARMLESS CHARTERERS IN RESPECT OF ANY LOSS, LIABILITY, DAMAGE, DELAY, DEVIATION, DETENTION, FINES, COSTS (INCLUDING ADDITIONAL ELEVATOR/CARRYING CHARGES), EXPENSES OR [ DIRECT AND INDIRECT ] CONSEQUENCES WHATSOEVER ARISING OR IN ANY WAY RELATED TO OWNERS’ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ANY PART OF THIS CLAUSE.
FOR THE AVOIDANCE OF DOUBT, WHERE OWNERS ARE IN BREACH OF THIS CLAUSE, TIME SHALL NOT COUNT AS LAYTIME/DEMURRAGE INCLUDING FOR ANY CONSEQUENTIAL LOSS OF TIME ARISING OR IN ANY WAY RELATED TO OWNERS’ FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ANY PART OF THIS CLAUSE.
R
- RBCT RULES WITH REGARD TO PORT HEALTH
,
QUARANTINE, FREE PRATIQUE
SHALL BE APPLICABLE FOR
THE PERFORMING VESSEL AT LOAD PORT AT OWNERS COST & TIME.
VESSEL OWNERS GURANTEE THAT PERFORMING VESSEL & CREW INCLUDING OFFICERS TO FULLY COMPLY WITH PORT HEALTH
& QUARANTINE
RULES & REGULATIONS
OF LOADING & DISCHARGING PORTS
AT OWNERS COST & TIME
. ANY TIME TAKEN AND / OR LOST DUE TO NON-COMPLIANCE SHALL
NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE EVEN IF THE VESSEL IS ON DEMURRAGE .
OWNERS ENSURE THAT ABOVE COMPLIANCE SHOULD NOT AFFECT VESSEL’S BERTHING, SAILING, LOADING & DISCHARGING OPERATIONS AT BOTH ENDS & AT EACH PORT.
1// CARGO AND QUANTITY :
75,000 MT +/-10% OO STEAM COAL (SINGLE GRADE)
MAX PARADIP DRAFT 14.50 METER
.
IN CASE TWO GRADE LOADING :
GRADE “A” & GRADE “B” TO BE LOADED & CARRIED WITHIN VESSEL’S NATURAL HOLD SEGREGATION & OWNERS CONFIRM THAT THE VESSEL CAN LOAD, CARRY & DISCHARGE WITHOUT COMMINGLING OF ABOVE MENTIONED GRADE(S)  AND OWNERS TO REVERT STOWAGE PLAN ALONG WITH THE VESSEL NOMINATION.
CARGO WILL BE LOADED AND STOWED IN ACCORDANCE WITH LATEST SHIPPING REGULATIONS OF RICHARDS BAY COAL TERMINAL, SOUTH AFRICA (RBCT) .
2
// LOAD PORT: 1 SP 1/2SB RICHARDS BAY COAL TERMINAL – SOUTH AFRICA
OWNERS WARRANT THAT THE VESSEL / MASTER SHALL BE FULLY COMPLIANT OF ALL THE LOADING TERMINAL RULES AND REGULATIONS INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LATEST SHIPPING REGULATIONS ISSUED BY RBCT WHICH ARE INCORPORATED INTO THIS CHARTER PARTY AND / OR FIXTURE. OWNERS AGREE THAT THE VESSEL IS WILLING TO WARP ALONGSIDE SHIPPERS QUAY DURING LOADING OPERATIONS IN ORDER TO REMAIN UNDER THE LOADING SPOUT AT ALL TIMES. TIME SO USED NOT TO COUNT LAYTIME OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE.
IN ANY CASE RBCT SHIPPING TERMS INCLIDING LAYTIME IS PART OF THIS CONTRACT.
3
// LOAD RATE: LOAD RATE AS PER SCALE AND AS PER APPLICABLE RBCT RULES AND REGULATION.
4
// DISCH PORT (S) CHOPT
1SP 1 /2 SB PARADIP
OR
1SP 1 /2 SB PARADIP + 1SP 1 /2 SB HALDIA
CHRTERERS HAVE THE RIGHT TO NOMINATE OTHER SAFE DISCHARGE PORT(S) AND SAFE ANCHORAGE IN EAST / WEST OF COST INDIA FOR WHICH THE FREIGHT BSS OPEN BOOK SHOULD ALWAYS YIELD SAME TIME CHARTER EQUIVALENT FOR OWNERS AS COMPARED TO 1/1 FRT RBCT/ SALAYA, BUT NOT PUTTING OWNERS IN ANY LESSER POSITION.
5
//
LAYCAN: CHOPT
19
th
to 28
th
February 2026
0r
10
th
to 19
th
2024 February 2026
The Charterer shall declare the one of the above lay can on 16
th
Jan 2026
(IF VESSEL DOES NOT ARRIVE WITHIN LAYCAN, VESSEL’S STATUS
AS SPOT VESSEL ETC. & LAY TIME
WILL BE GUIDED BY RBCT RULES & REGULATION)
6
// DISCHARGING RATE
CHOPT:
PARADIP : 18
,
000 MT PWWD
HALDIA  :
18,
000 MT PWWD
OR
PARADIP : 20
,
000 MT PWWD
HALDIA  :
20,
000 MT PWWD
7
// DEMM / DESPATCH:   USD XXXXX PDPR DHD WTS BENDS.
8
// FREIGHT RATE BASIS 1/1 & 1/ 2( EXCLUDING PORT DA AT DISCAHRGE PORT, PLEASE REF CLS. NO.24)
PARADIP USD XX.XX PMT BASIS 20,000 MT PWWD DISCHARGE RATE
PARADIP USD XX.XX PMT BASIS 18,000 MT PWWD DISCHARGE RATE
PARADIP + HALDIA USD XX.XX PMT BASIS 20,000 MT PWWD DISCHARGE RATE
PARADIP + HALDIA USD XX.XX PMT BASIS 18,000 MT PWWD DISCHARGE RATE
(ABOVE FREIGHT IS ALL INCLUSIVE OF AWRIP , WRIP , PIRACY
AND / OR
INSURANCES AND NO EXTRA MONEY WILL BE PAID).
9
// FREIGHT PAYMENT CLAUSE:
95% FREIGHT  (LESS/ INCLUDING BROKERAGE)  IS TO BE  MADE INTO OWNERS BANK ACCOUNT WITHIN 7 (SEVEN) BANKING DAYS, BUT ALWAYS BBB, AFTER COMPLETION OF LOADING, SIGNING
&
RELEASING B/L STRICTLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH MATE\'S RECEIPT MARKED "FREIGHT PAYABLE AS PER CHARTERPARTY” & “CLEAN ON BOARD" AND RECEIPT OF OWNERS SIGNED INVOICE ON OWNERS LETTER HEAD BY EMAIL/FAX WITH OWNERS BANK DETAILS
AS PER THE FIXTRE NOTE / C.P ( IF CHARTERERS OPT TO PAY DISCHARGE PORT DA DIRECTLY TO THE AGENTS OR PORT SAME TO BE ADJUSTED AGAINST FREIGHT INVIOCE. AND CLAUSE 24 TO APPLY).
BALANCE 5 PERCENT FREIGHT (LESS/ INCLUDING BROKERAGE)  ALONG WITH LOADPORT/ DISCHARGE PORT DEMURRAGE (IF ANY) OR LESS DESPATCH MONEY (IF ANY) MUTUALLY AGREED, IS TO BE SETTLED WITHIN THIRTY(30) DAYS AFTER COMPLETION OF DISCHARGING AND SUBMISSION OF OWNERS LAYTIME SHEETS AND RELEVANT DOCUMENTS.
FREIGHT REMITTANCE TO BE REMITTED ON SHARING BASIS ONLY. CHRTRS WILL BEAR BANKING CHARGES AT THEIR END ONLY. ANY BANK CHARGES AT OWNERS BANK WHILE FRT REMITTANCE WILL BE ON OWNERS ACCOUNT
OR
CHARTS HAVE OPTION TO PAY FREIGHT THROUGH LC (LC DRAFT ATTACHED)
10
// OWNERS SHALL ENSURE THAT THE HOLDS AND ADJOINING HATCHES OF THE VESSEL, CHARTERED FOR THE VOYAGE, SHALL BE THROROUGHLY CLEANED AND FIT FOR THE RECEPTION AND CARRIAGE OF COAL CARGO IN BULK ON ARRIVAL LOAD PORT. ANY TIME LOST OR EXPENSES INCURRED BY REASON OF THE VESSEL NOT CONFORMING TO
ABOVE
SHALL BE SLOLY ON THE ACCOUNT OF
THE
OWNER .
11
//  VESSEL NOMINATION/ ETA / NOR AT LOADPORT AND DISPORT.
AT LOAD PORT - VESSEL NOMINATION, VESSEL SUBSTITUTION, ETA, NOTICE OF READINESS, STOWAGE PLAN, LOAD RATE & LAY TIME AND SUCH LOAD PORT OPERATIONS  TO BE STRICTLY GOVERNED / APPLICABLE AS PER LATEST RICHARDS BAY COAL TERMINAL – SOUTH AFRICA (RBCT) RULES AND REGULATIONS.
OWNERS ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY OWNERS WILL BE SCREENED BY THIRD PARTY AGENCIES AND/OR SERVICES, AND CONSENTS TO ITS DATA BEING USED IN THAT CAPACITY. CHRTS / SELLER CURRENTLY USES THE COMPLINET SERVICE, BUT RESERVES THE RIGHT TO USE ANY OTHER
SERVICE
PROVIDERS AT ITS DISCRETION. IN THE EVENT A VESSEL IS ACCEPTED BUT CHARTERER / SELLER SUBSEQUENTLY DISCOVERS THAT IT IS OWNED, MANAGED OR OPERATED BY A DESIGNATED PERSON OR ENTITY SUBJECT TO SANCTIONS UNDER ANY APPLICABLE LAWS, CHRTS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REJECT THE VESSEL AND OWNER SHALL PROMPTLY ARRANGE FOR A SUBSTITUTE VESSEL.
MASTER OF THE VESSEL TO GIVE DISPORT AGENTS 10/5/4/3/2/1 DAY EXPECTED TIME OF ARRIVAL ALONG WITH ARRIVAL DRAFT .
LOAD PORT NOTICE OF READINESS  (NOR) - TO BE TENDERED
STRICTLY
AS PER RBCT RULES AND REGULATIONS WITHIN LAY CAN.
IN THE EVENT THAT THE VESSEL IS FOUND TO BE NOT READY IN ALL RESPECTS AT LOADING PORT UPON TENDERING NOTICE OF READINESS OR UPON BERTHING, SAME WILL BE STRICTLY GUIDED BY RBCT RULES AND REGULATIONS.
DISPORT NOR-  OWNER /
MASTER
SHALL TENDER VALID NOR WHEN THE VESSEL HAS ARRIVED AT DISCHARGE PORT AND READY IN ALL RESPECTS AT EACH DISCHARGE PORT (S). NOR TO BE TENDERED IN WRITING (E-MAIL, FACSIMILE) AND / OR RADIO, ANYTIME DAY OR NIGHT SHINC.
THE 12 HRS. TURN TIME SHALL COMMENCE AFTER NOR & FREE PARTIQUE / PORT HEALTH CLEARANCE HAVE BEEN OBTAINED BY THE VESSEL.
VESSEL HAS TO COMPLY WITH THE LOCAL DISCHARGE PORT HEALTH AUTHORITY REGULATIONS FOR COVID 19 PANDEMIC AND OBTAIN FREE PRATIQUE / PORT HEALTH CLEARANCE AS NECESSARY.
IN THE EVENT THAT THE VESSEL IS FOUND TO BE NOT READY IN ALL RESPECTS FOR DISCHARGING UPON ARRIVAL AT DISCHARGE PORT  ALL LAYTIME USED ( IF ANY) / DEMURRAGE SHALL BE CANCELLED AND LAYTIME SHALL ONLY START TO COUNT FROM THE TIME THE VESSEL IS READY TO COMMENCE DISCHARGING.
IF THE VESSEL LOSES BERTHING DUE TO MASTER / OWNERS / VESSEL’S FAULT /
GOD’S ACT,
THEN COST & TIME RELATED TO SAME NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE TILL BERTHING OF THE VESSEL EVEN IF THE VESSEL IS ON DEMURRAGE AT DISCHARGE PORT.
IN THE EVENT OF ANY INCONSISTENCY BETWEEN THE TERMS OF THIS CONTRACT AND THE STANDARD SHIPPING REGULATIONS OF THE DISCHARGE PORT, THE STANDARD SHIPPING REGULATIONS OF THE DISCHARGE PORT SHALL PREVAIL.
12
// LAYTIME AT LOAD PORT: SHALL COMMENCE AND CALCULATE STRICTLY AS PER APPLICABLE RBCT RULES AND REGULATIONS.  LAYTIME AT EACH DISPORT SHALL COMMENCE 12HRS AFTER VALID N.O.R. HAS BEEN TENDERED AND ACCEPTED IN EACH DISPORT EIU.
BIMCO HOLIDAYS NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME UU. LAYTIME TO CEASE COUNTING UPON COMPLETION OF LOADING / DISCHARGING AT LOADPORT & DISPORT (S) RESPECTIVELY.
13
// FOLLOWINGS ARE NOT TO COUNT AS LAYTIME
AND / OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE
EVEN IF THE VESSEL IS ON DEMURRAGE AT DISCHARGE PORTS:
(A)TIME SPENT FOR FIRST OPENING AND CLOSING OF HATCHES (WHERE APPLICABLE) AT THE COMMENCEMENT AND COMPLETION OF DISCHARGING, INITIAL AND FINAL DRAUGHT SURVEYS/ DRAUGHT CHECKS  & LOWERING OF GANGWAY;
OWNERS TO ALLOW FOR ONE INTERMEDIATE / INTERIM DRAFT SURVEY AT EACH DISPORT SUCH TIME NOT TO COUNT.
(B) ANY TIME TAKEN / LOST, IF DISCHING IS INTERRUPTED TO CONDUCT BUSINESS ON BEHALF OF THE OWNER FOR CUSTOM CLEARANCE AND / OR FREE PRATIQUE AFTER BERTHING OF THE VESSEL, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOWERING OF GANGWAY, TAKING BUNKERS, VITALS, STORES, CREW CHANGE ETC AND/OR RESULT OF BREAK DOWN, INEFFCIENCY, REPAIRS  OR OTHER INABILITY CAUSED SOLELY BY OWNERS / VSL’S FAULT TO LOAD / DISCH CARGO EVEN IF THE VESSEL IS ON DEMURRAGE;
(C ) ANY TIME LOST IF DISCHING IS INTERRUPTED BY THE VESSEL IN ORDER TO CONDUCT BUSINESS ON BEHALF OF THE OWNER INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO TAKING BUNKERS, VITALS, STORES, CREW CHANGE ETC.
ANY TIME LOST IF DISCHARGING IS INTERRUPTED BECAUSE OF BREAK DOWN, INEFFCIENCY, REPAIRS OR OTHER INABILITY CAUSED SOLELY BY OWNERS OR VSL’S FAULT TO DISCH CARGO.
ANY TIME LOSS IF DISCHARING IS INTERRUPTED BECAUSE OF CUSTOM CLEARANCE AND / OR FRE PARTIQUE, INCLDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO SUCH OCCURANCES, AFTER BERHTING OF THE VESSEL
(D) ANY TIME LOST DUE TO INSUFFICIENT BALLAST PUMP CAPACITY WITH RESPECT TO AGREED DISCHARGE RATE.
(E) ANY TIME LOST DUE TO A LABOUR DISPUTE, STRIKE, GO SLOW, WORK TO RULE, LOCK OUT, STOPPAGE OR RESTRAINT OF LABOUR
ANY TIME LOST BECAUSE OF THE STRIKE, STOPPAGE, BREAKDOWN ETC DUE TO MASTER, OFFICERS OR CREW OF THE VESSEL,
(F) ANY TIME LOST DUE TO MILITARY OR NAVAL INTERVENTION
(G) ANY TIME LOST DUE TO COMPLIANCE WITH STATUTORY AND CLASS REQUIREMENTS FOR THE VESSEL.
(H) ANY TIME LOST WHERE CARGO OPERATION AND / OR BERTHING IS INTERRUPTED DUE TO WIND, RAIN, FOG, OR OTHER NATURAL CAUSES. HOWEVER FOR THIS CLAUSE ONCE ON DEMURRAGE ALWAYS ON DEMURRAGE APPLICABLE
(I ) DELAYS DUE TO BREAKDOWN OF THE VESSEL’S EQUIPMENT(S), BALLASTING / DEBALLASTING PUMPS , LIGHTING EQUIPMENT(S) AND DELAYS DUE TO THE VESSEL’S REQUIREMENT(S) TO CHANGE DISCHARGING SEQUENCES PROVIDED NOT ARISING FROM REVISED RESTRICTIONS / CONSTRAINTS NEWLY INTRODUCED BY RECEIVERS.
(J) SHIFTING TIME DUE TO THE VESSEL’S AND/OR PORT’S REQUIREMENTS. (CHRS/RECEIVERS REQUEST FOR SHIFTING ON ACCOUNT OF CARGO INTERESTS SHALL BE FOR CHRS TIME/ACCT.)
(K)SHIFTING TIME FROM CUSTOMARY WAITING ANCHORAGE TO DISCHARGE BERTH/PLACE INCLUDING TIME TAKEN IN LOCK GATES.
(L) ACTUAL TIME LOST FROM BERTHING TILL GANGWAY DOWN AT DISCHARGE BERTH
(M) TIME
LOST
FOR VSL SHIFTING BETWEEN NON- WORKING BERTHS, NON WORKING BERTHS TO WORKING BERTHS & WARPING ALONG THE JETY.
(N) BIMCO HOLIDAYS UNLESS USED IF USED ACTUAL TIME USED TO COUNT
14
// ANY DISPUTES REGARDING STEVEDORES’ DAMAGE TO THE VESSEL IS TO BE SETTLED DIRECTLY BETWEEN OWNERS AND STEVEDORES. MASTER TO NOTIFY AGENTS AND STEVEDORES IN WRITING WITHIN 24 HOURS AFTER SUCH OCCURRENCE. CHTRRS TO COOPERATE BEST & TAKE ALL REQRD STEPS IN ASSISTING OWNERS TO OBTAIN SETTLEMENT FOR THE SAME.
15
// LAYTIME ALLOWED FOR LOADING/DISCHARGING TO BE NON-REVERSIBLE BENDS.
16/
/ TAXES / DUES ON CGO, IF ANY IS TO BE FOR CHRTS ACCOUNT BENDS.
TAXES/ DUES ON VSL & / OR FRT , DEMURRAGE (EVEN IF UNDER DTA), IF ANY IS TO BE FOR OWNERS ACCOUNT BENDS.
17
// GA/ARB IN
SINGAPORE
AND ENGLISH LAW TO APPLY
18

22// FORCE MAJEURE.
THE TERM “FORCE MAJEURE” AS USED HEREIN SHALL MEAN SUCH ACT, EVENT OR CAUSE(S) BEYOND THE REASONABLE CONTROL OF THE PARTY SEEKING TO BE EXCUSED FROM ANY DELAY OR FAILURE TO PERFORM, BUT ONLY IF AND TO THE EXTENT THAT SUCH ACT, EVENT OR CAUSE, DESPITE THE EXERCISE OF ALL BEST ENDEAVORS AND EFFORTS BY SUCH PARTY, CANNOT BE OR BE CAUSED TO BE PREVENTED, AVOIDED OR REMOVED BY SUCH PARTY.
THE TERM “FORCE MAJEURE” AS USED IN THIS AGREEMENT INCLUDES, SO LONG AS THE FOREGOING PARAGRAPH IS SATISFIED, BUT IS NOT LIMITED TO: PLAGUE OR OTHER EPIDEMIC(INCLUDING PANDEMICS), ACTS OF GOD, LIGHTNING, STORM, FIRE, FLOOD, QUARANTINE,  LANDSLIDE OR EARTHQUAKE; ACTS OF THE PUBLIC ENEMY, WAR(WHETHER DECLARE OR NOT DECLARE OR WAR LIKE SITUATION), CLOSURE OF NAVIGATIONAL CHANNELOF CONCERNED PORT(S) OF FIXTURE FOR ANY REASON, INSURRECTION, SABOTAGE, BLOCKADE, RIOT OR DISORDER, REVOLUTIONS,  ORDERS OR ACTS OF COURT OR MILITARY OR CIVIL AUTHORITY OR GOVT TO WHICH SUCH PARTY IS LEGALLY SUBJECT AND BOUND UNDER THE APPLICABLE LAW TO ACT IN COMPLIANCE THEREOF, ANY CHANGES MADE BY GOVT OF EXPORTING COUNTRY SUCH AS CHANGES IN TAXES & DUTIES ON CARGO, IMPOSITION OF RESTRICTION ON EXPORT ETC, ANY CHANGE/MODIFICATION IN COMMERCIAL LAWS, RULES AND REGULATIONS BY THE GOVERNMENT WITH RESPECT CARGO EXPORT, EMBARGO, STRIKE, LOCKOUT AND OTHER LABOR DISTURBANCES, EXPLOSION, BREAKDOWN OR MALFUNCTION OR DAMAGE OR ACCIDENT BY FORCE OR OTHERWISE TO MINE RAILROAD, STORAGE FACILITIES, PROCESSING PLANTS, LOADING/DISCHARGING TERMINAL OR LOADING/DISCHARGING  PORT FACILITIES,  UNAVAILABILITY OF EQUIPMENT OR MANPOWER OR ENERGY AT TERMINAL ETC .
ANY FORCE MAJEURE EVENT WHATSOEVER CLAIMED BY THE SHIPPER OR PARTY(INCLUDING PORT) WITH WHOM CHRTS AND/OR CARGO RECEIVER HAS MADE SALE CONTRACT OR ANY CONTRACT RELATED TO LOADING AND DISCHARGING OF SUBJECT VESSEL DECLARES FORCE MAJURE, IT SHALL BE DEEMED AS FORCE MAJEURE EVENT UNDER THIS CP
IF EITHER PARTY (THE “AFFECTED PARTY”) FAILS, OR IS DELAYED WHOLLY OR IN PART, IN CARRYING OUT ANY OF ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THIS AGREEMENT DUE TO FORCE MAJEURE (EXCEPT AS OTHERWISE EXPRESSLY PROVIDED IN THIS AGREEMENT), THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE AFFECTED PARTY SHALL BE SUSPENDED TO THE EXTENT MADE NECESSARY DURING THE CONTINUANCE OF SUCH FORCE MAJEURE OR ITS EFFECTS; AND
THE AFFECTED PARTY SHALL INCUR NO LIABILITY BY REASON OF ITS FAILURE TO PERFORM THE OBLIGATIONS SO SUSPENDED, PROVIDED THAT: THE AFFECTED PARTY SHALL PROMPTLY GIVE WRITTEN NOTICE TO THE OTHER PARTY (THE “NON-AFFECTED PARTY”) STATING THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE FORCE MAJEURE EVENT AND SPECIFYING THE NATURE OF THE EVENT TOGETHER WITH A GOOD FAITH ESTIMATE OF THE DEGREE TO WHICH AND THE PERIOD FOR WHICH ITS PERFORMANCE WILL BE AFFECTED THEREBY, AND THE AFFECTED PARTY SHALL, UPON REQUEST BY THE NON-AFFECTED PARTY, PROVIDE EVIDENCE FROM THE COMPETENT AUTHORITY AS TO THE OCCURRENCE OF THE FORCE MAJEURE EVENT AND ITS ANTICIPATED DURATION;THE DISABLING EFFECTS OF SUCH FORCE MAJEURE SHALL BE ELIMINATED BY THE AFFECTED PARTY AS SOON AS AND TO THE EXTENT REASONABLY POSSIBLE; AND AS SOON AS REASONABLY POSSIBLE AFTER THE END OF THE FORCE MAJEURE, NOTIFY THE NON-AFFECTED PARTY IN WRITING THAT THE FORCE MAJEURE HAS ENDED. IF THE FORCE MAJEURE CONTINUES FOR MORE THAN
SIXTY ( 60 )
DAYS, EITHER PARTY WILL HAVE THE RIGHT TO FORTHWITH TERMINATE THIS AGREEMENT BY WAY OF WRITTEN NOTICE IN WHICH CASE NEITHER PARTY SHALL HAVE THE RIGHT TO CLAIM FOR ANY DAMAGE OR LOSS RESULTING THEREFROM. LAYTIME AND/OR TIME ON DEMURRAGE ARE NOT TO COUNT DURING FORCE MAJEURE AND ITS CONSEQUENCE.
